questions.q: Who directed the two-part crime epic Gangs of Wasseypur?
questions.explanation: Gangs of Wasseypur was directed by Anurag Kashyap.

questions.q: In which year were both parts of Gangs of Wasseypur released in India?
questions.explanation: Gangs of Wasseypur was released in two parts in 2012.

questions.q: Gangs of Wasseypur centres on feuds tied to which industry in the Dhanbad region?
questions.explanation: The film traces decades of feuds connected to the coal mafia of the Dhanbad region.

questions.q: Which actor played the patriarch Sardar Khan in Gangs of Wasseypur?
questions.explanation: Manoj Bajpayee played Sardar Khan in Gangs of Wasseypur.

questions.q: Which actor's role as Faisal Khan in Gangs of Wasseypur became a major career breakthrough for him?
questions.explanation: Nawazuddin Siddiqui's performance as Faisal Khan was a launchpad role in his career.

questions.q: In how many parts was Gangs of Wasseypur released theatrically in India?
questions.explanation: Gangs of Wasseypur was released as a two-part film.

questions.q: At which French film festival did Gangs of Wasseypur premiere in 2012?
questions.explanation: Gangs of Wasseypur premiered in the Directors' Fortnight section at the 2012 Cannes Film Festival.

questions.q: In which Indian state is the town of Wasseypur, the setting of Gangs of Wasseypur, located?
questions.explanation: Wasseypur is a locality within Dhanbad in the state of Jharkhand.

questions.q: Which actress played Nagma Khan, the wife of Sardar Khan, in Gangs of Wasseypur?
questions.explanation: Richa Chadha played Nagma Khan, Sardar Khan's first wife, in Gangs of Wasseypur.

questions.q: Gangs of Wasseypur is generally classified as which genre of film?
questions.explanation: Gangs of Wasseypur is a crime drama tracing gang feuds across generations.

questions.q: Who composed the music for Gangs of Wasseypur?
questions.explanation: The music for Gangs of Wasseypur was composed by Sneha Khanwalkar.

questions.q: Which earthy folk-inspired song became one of the most popular tracks from the Gangs of Wasseypur soundtrack?
questions.explanation: "Womaniya," sung by Rekha Bhardwaj and Khushboo Raj, was a hugely popular track from the Gangs of Wasseypur soundtrack.

questions.q: Which filmmaker played the antagonist Ramadhir Singh, the coal-mafia don and politician, in Gangs of Wasseypur?
questions.explanation: Filmmaker Tigmanshu Dhulia played the antagonist Ramadhir Singh in Gangs of Wasseypur.

questions.q: The Faisal Khan character popularised which menacing catchphrase in Gangs of Wasseypur?
options: "Rishte mein toh hum tumhare baap lagte hain"
questions.explanation: Faisal Khan's recurring line "Keh ke lunga" became a cult catchphrase from the film.

questions.q: Which actress played Mohsina, the love interest of Faisal Khan, in Gangs of Wasseypur?
questions.explanation: Huma Qureshi played Mohsina, Faisal Khan's love interest, in Gangs of Wasseypur Part 2.

questions.q: Which actor, later widely known as a character actor, played the assassin Sultan in Gangs of Wasseypur?
questions.explanation: Pankaj Tripathi played the Qureshi clan assassin Sultan, a role that boosted his profile.

questions.q: Who wrote the story and co-wrote the screenplay of Gangs of Wasseypur and also acted in it?
questions.explanation: Zeishan Quadri, who hailed from Wasseypur, wrote the story, co-wrote the film and also acted in it as Definite.

questions.q: Across roughly which span of decades does the story of Gangs of Wasseypur unfold?
questions.explanation: The saga spans roughly from the 1940s through the 2000s, tracing multiple generations of feuds.

questions.q: The Gangs of Wasseypur soundtrack is noted for blending Bihari and Jharkhandi folk traditions with which other style?
questions.explanation: Sneha Khanwalkar's soundtrack fused regional folk voices with rap-flavoured and contemporary arrangements, giving the film its gritty sound.

questions.q: Which production banner was co-founded by Anurag Kashyap, director of Gangs of Wasseypur?
questions.explanation: Anurag Kashyap was a co-founder of Phantom Films, a banner associated with the indie movement Gangs of Wasseypur typifies.

questions.q: What is the combined approximate running time of both parts of Gangs of Wasseypur taken together?
questions.explanation: The two parts together run for roughly five hours of screen time (about 319 minutes).

questions.q: In Gangs of Wasseypur, the central blood feud is primarily between the Khan family and which character?
questions.explanation: The central blood feud pits the Khan family against the coal-mafia don Ramadhir Singh.

questions.q: Which actor played Shahid Khan, Sardar Khan's father, whose killing sets the family vendetta in motion in Gangs of Wasseypur?
questions.explanation: Jaideep Ahlawat played Shahid Khan, whose death ignites the multigenerational feud.

questions.q: Which actor played the young gang member nicknamed "Perpendicular" in Gangs of Wasseypur?
questions.explanation: Aditya Kumar played the razor-blade-chewing teen nicknamed Perpendicular.

questions.q: Who served as the cinematographer of Gangs of Wasseypur?
questions.explanation: Rajeev Ravi was the cinematographer of Gangs of Wasseypur.

questions.q: Which actress played Durga, Sardar Khan's second wife, in Gangs of Wasseypur?
questions.explanation: Reema Sen played Durga, Sardar Khan's second wife, in Gangs of Wasseypur.

questions.q: Within which parallel section of the Cannes Film Festival did Gangs of Wasseypur screen in 2012?
questions.explanation: Gangs of Wasseypur screened in the Directors' Fortnight (Quinzaine des Réalisateurs) at Cannes 2012.

questions.q: The character Definite in Gangs of Wasseypur was portrayed by which person, who was also a co-writer of the film?
questions.explanation: Zeishan Quadri, a co-writer of the film, played the character Definite.

questions.q: In 2019, the British newspaper The Guardian included Gangs of Wasseypur in a list ranking it among which group of films?
options: The 100 best films of the 21st century
questions.explanation: In 2019, The Guardian's ranking of the 100 best films of the 21st century featured Gangs of Wasseypur, the only Indian film on the list, at number 59.

questions.q: Which actor played J. P. Singh, son of Ramadhir Singh, in Gangs of Wasseypur?
questions.explanation: Satya Anand (Satyakam Anand) played J. P. Singh, the son of the don Ramadhir Singh, in Gangs of Wasseypur.
